title: AN ACT PROVIDING THAT THE SANTA CRUZ IRRIGATION SYSTEM IN THE PROVINCE OF LAGUNA BE HEREAFTER KNOWN AS THE MAGSAYSAY IRRIGATION SYSTEM.

chunks.text:
H. No. 218 / 55 OG No. 25, 4617 (June 22, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2186, May 07, 1959 ]

AN ACT PROVIDING THAT THE SANTA CRUZ IRRIGATION SYSTEM IN THE PROVINCE OF LAGUNA BE HEREAFTER KNOWN AS THE MAGSAYSAY IRRIGATION SYSTEM.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Santa Cruz Irrigation System in the Province of Laguna shall hereafter be known as the Magsaysay Irrigation System.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, May 7, 1959.
